name: Guam Contractors Licensing Board Contractors Listing
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the Guam Contractors Licensing Board listing before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Guam contractor license records exposed by the official Contractors Listing page
knownExclusions: Source fields, update cadence, inactive-license coverage, and classification semantics require follow-up review before adapter work.
Business licenses, permits, enforcement records, and other professional licenses may require separate official sources.
No redistribution permission for generated datasets has been confirmed.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Future access should prefer stable official export paths if confirmed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official Guam CLB listing metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, business authorization, permit, or local record does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The official page links annual contractor listings, but no stable structured CSV, XLSX, JSON, or API source was confirmed during the 2026-06-27 review.
researchNotes: The source is contractor-specific, but the annual listing presentation is not a stable structured ingestion contract and historical/inactive coverage remains unclear.
maintainerNotes: Do not use older mirrored contractor lists or unofficial copies as source data.

researchEvidence.note: Official page exposed 2026 and 2027 annual contractor listings but no stable structured machine-readable interface.

blocker.summary: Annual contractor listings are public, but no stable structured source suitable for a deterministic adapter was confirmed.
